title: Give Feedback
description: Submit feature request, report a bug or provide your rating of Launchpad. Only fields marked with * are required.

chatDialogueBox.title: Viktor
chatDialogueBox.description: I collect feedback on DSB Chat, Workspaces, and Job Post Creator. Report bugs, request features, or share your thoughts to help us improve!
chatDialogueBox.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm Viktor, your feedback assistant.
chatDialogueBox.promptsTitle: Choose one of the options below or describe your request in textarea

workflowImpactLevel.validationMessage: Please select how much this impacts your work.

onCancel.success: Your form has been successfully reset.
onCancel.error: Something went wrong when resetting your form. Please try to reset again.

onSubmit.success: Your feedback has been successfully submitted. Thank you for your time!
onSubmit.error: Something went wrong when submitting your form. Please try to reset and submit again.

maxQuantity.textOne: You can upload a maximum of

fileSize.textTwo: exceeds the maximum allowed size of

fileValidations.maxQuota: The total file size exceeds the maximum allowed quota of

issueDescription.label: Description of the Issue *
issueDescription.tooltip: Provide a detailed description of the issue you encountered, including what you were doing when it happened.
issueDescription.validationMessage: Please describe the issue in at least 10 characters.

expectedBehaviour.label: Expected Behaviour *
expectedBehaviour.placeholder: Describe what you expected to happend
expectedBehaviour.tooltip: Explain what you expected the application to do instead of the issue you encountered.
expectedBehaviour.validationMessage: Please tell us what you expected to happen.

stepsToReproduceIssue.label: Reproduce the Issue *
stepsToReproduceIssue.placeholder: Please list all the steps you took before you encountered the issue
stepsToReproduceIssue.tooltip: List the exact steps you followed that led to the issue, so we can reproduce and investigate it.
stepsToReproduceIssue.validationMessage: Please list the steps to reproduce the issue.

errorFrequency.label: How many times have you encoutered this error *
errorFrequency.tooltip: Indicate how frequently you have experienced this issue, whether it happened once, a few times, or consistently.
errorFrequency.validationMessage: Please select how often this issue occurs.

workflowImpactDescription.label: Workflow Impact Description
workflowImpactDescription.placeholder: Describe how the issue affects your daily workflow and launchpad experience
workflowImpactDescription.tooltip: Describe how this issue is impacting your ability to use the application or complete your tasks.
workflowImpactDescription.validationMessage: Please describe how this issue impacts your workflow.

workflowSeverityImpactLevel.label: Workflow Impact Level
workflowSeverityImpactLevel.tooltip: Rate the impact the issue's has on your workflow, from low (minor inconvenience) to critical (completely blocking your work).

supportingReference.label: Supporting Reference
supportingReference.tooltip: Attach any relevant files, such as screenshots, logs, or videos, that can help us understand and resolve the issue.

placeholders.title: Drag & Drop Reference Files
placeholders.subtitle: Add error or logs screenshots, videos

errorMessages.label: Error Messages
errorMessages.placeholder: Paste any error message you have encountered

featureDescription.label: Feature Description *
featureDescription.placeholder: Detailed description of the feature, how it would work
featureDescription.tooltip: Provide a detailed explanation of the feature you are requesting, including how it should work and what it should do.
featureDescription.validationMessage: Please describe the feature in at least 10 characters.

problemStatement.label: Problem Statement *
problemStatement.placeholder: Describe what problem are your trying to solve with this feature
problemStatement.tooltip: Explain the specific problem or challenge you are facing that this feature would address.
problemStatement.validationMessage: Please explain the problem this feature would solve.

useCaseScenario.label: Use Case Scenario *
useCaseScenario.placeholder: Describe how would you use this feature in your daily work
useCaseScenario.tooltip: Provide examples of how you would use this feature in your daily tasks or work.
useCaseScenario.validationMessage: Please describe how you would use this feature.

otherInformation.label: Other Information
otherInformation.placeholder: Add other information you may find useful

workflowSeverityImpactLevel.label: Workflow Impact *
workflowSeverityImpactLevel.tooltip: Rate the importance of this feature to your workflow, from low (nice to have) to critical (essential for your work).
workflowSeverityImpactLevel.validationMessage: Please evaluate how this issue impacts your workflow.

supportingReference.label: Supporting Reference
supportingReference.tooltip: Attach any relevant files, such as mockups, screenshots, or documents, that can help us understand your feature request.

starRating.label: How would you like to rate your experience for Launchpad *
starRating.tooltip: Rate your experience on a scale of 1 to 5 stars, where 1 is the lowest and 5 is the highest.

timeSavingData.label: How many hours per week do you estimate Launchpad saves you? *
timeSavingData.validationMessage: Please estimate how much time Launchpad saves you each week.

workQualityImpact.label: How would you rate the impact of Launchpad on the quality of your work? *
workQualityImpact.validationMessage: Please rate how Launchpad has impacted the quality of your work.

jobSatisfaction.label: How has Launchpad impacted your job satisfaction? *
jobSatisfaction.validationMessage: Please describe how Launchpad has impacted your job satisfaction.

useCaseScenario.label: Can you share specific use cases on how you use Launchpad in your daily work? *
useCaseScenario.placeholder: For example, 'I use Launchpad to automate repetitive tasks like data entry'
useCaseScenario.tooltip: Share examples of how you use Launchpad in your daily tasks to improve productivity or efficiency.
useCaseScenario.validationMessage: Please describe how you use Launchpad.

otherAiToolsUsed.label: Are you using other AI tools? If yes, please list them.

missingFeatureIndication.label: What features do the other AI tools have that Launchpad is missing?
missingFeatureIndication.placeholder: For example, 'light and dark mode, or advanced analytics.'
missingFeatureIndication.tooltip: List any features you feel are lacking in Launchpad compared to other AI tools you use.
